debug_info.goal:
q n : ℕ
lamb : ℂ
a : ℝ := lamb.re
b : ℝ := lamb.im
h : lamb ∈ primitiveRoots n ℂ
h_lamb : lamb ≠ 1
h_a_lt_one : ‖a‖ < 1
⊢ ‖eval (↑q) (X - C lamb)‖ ^ 2 = ‖↑q - lamb‖ ^ 2

proof:
simp [Polynomial.eval, Polynomial.aeval_def, sub_eq_add_neg, add_comm, add_left_comm,
          add_assoc]
failed_attempts:
